response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to identify any musical content. 2. Confirmed that the video contains only spoken dialogue and sound effects, with no vocal music tracks. 3. Mapped the skit into 5 logical scenes based on thematic and visual shifts. 4. Set 'contains_vocal_music' to false for all scenes and nullified all song-related metadata fields as per instructions.
response.global_summary: This video is a 3D animated skit featuring VTubers having a conversational argument. There is no background music or vocal performances throughout the video.

scenes.description: The video starts with a character (the one with the yellow jacket) questioning who invited someone, leading into a series of character arguments.
The scene shifts to a kitchen area, with continued banter and a monologue by the fairy-like character, Bijoux.
The characters continue to argue about noise complaints, lawyers, and apartment ownership.
The argument culminates in one character falling to the floor, followed by reactions and further bickering.
The skit concludes with a conversation about food and cooking, as the characters wind down.
